name: Cantonese Sweet and Sour Spam
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat oil over medium heat.
2. Add carrot, green onion, garlic, and cucumber; cook, stirring occasionally until crisp tender (4 to 5 minutes).
3. Stir in remaining ingredients except Spam and bamboo shoots.
4. Cook, stirring, until sauce is thickened.
5. Add Spam and bamboo shoots; cook until heated through.
6. Serve over rice if desired.
